# Provider Stdin Command ACL

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerruntimeboundarydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime actor boundary](../runtime-actor-boundary.md)

Reducer commands are provider-neutral. A C4 adapter implements `agentbridge.ProviderInputBuilder` only when it has a provider stdin control protocol.

| Provider | Input command | Concrete frame |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Claude | `CommandApproveTool` / `CommandRejectTool` | `control_response` stream-json frame; `control_request.request_id` is preserved as `ToolRef.ProviderRequestID`. |
| Codex | JSON-RPC protocol driver internal command | Pending request id is owned by the driver actor and answered through JSON-RPC response. |
